target: Derive T_r=exp(pi*i*r^2/N) from exact Q without residue-dependent retuning.
settling_test: Produce a native map from lifted Q state to r^2/N seating before Q acts.

target: Derive dense finite Fourier S from exact B/L without adding a kernel.
settling_test: Show B/L maps e_r to N^(-1/2) sum_s exp(-2pi i r s/N)e_s value-for-value.

target: Derive Fourier kernel from Ancient Yi successor/carry, not merely diagonalize carry by Fourier basis.
settling_test: Show the character basis is generated by accumulated carry observations.

target: Derive a Walsh/Fourier representation from six-line flip group characters.
settling_test: Show the representation layer is earned by the same selected-line flip operations.
